title: test(1796h): expand internal-chat-access.ts coverage from 7 to 16 tests
body:
## Summary

9 new tests expanding coverage of internal-chat-access.ts from 7 smoke tests to 16. Part of #1796 coverage expansion.

### Functions covered

| Function | New tests | Key scenarios |
|---|---|---|
| getRequiredExternalAccount | 2 | ExternalAccountNotFoundError includes accountId, rethrows on db error |
| getRequiredAccountBySlug | 4 | returns account by slug, throws InternalChatAccountNotFoundError with slug, rethrows on db error |
| getMessageAttachmentByAccount | 3 | membership guard throws, MessageNotFoundError includes messageId, AttachmentNotFoundError includes attachmentName |

### Key behavioral insights

- `getRequiredAccountBySlug` is entirely new — never had functional tests before
- `ExternalAccountNotFoundError(accountId, prefix?)` — second arg is optional prefix, not a message
- `InternalChatAccountNotFoundError(slug)` — single arg, uses slug in default message
- `MessageNotFoundError` and `AttachmentNotFoundError` carry the respective identifiers as typed properties

All 16 tests pass.
Part of #1796 coverage expansion.
head: fix/1796h-internal-chat-access-tests
